no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: `cd cli/internal/server/frontend && bun run test:e2e` does not pass in this worktree. The artifacts grouping spec itself passes during the run, but the full suite reports unrelated failures in `e2e/a11y.spec.ts`, `e2e/documents.spec.ts`, `e2e/navigation.spec.ts`, and `e2e/executions.spec.ts`, plus a server panic in `DocStale` at `cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver.go:213`.
